name: SocialHub
highlight_text: SocialHub is best for reliable and secure data storage and processing
description:
Let SocialHub Work for You. 

SocialHub is an all-in-one software for social media management. It monitors web communication and facilitates the processing of incoming notifications. German servers store and process data. SocialHub is ISO 27001 certified (international certification for information security, cybersecurity, and privacy protection) and an official Meta and Trustpilot partner.
‍

Source: G2

Key Features of MeetEdgar.

  • Pre-plan and post content.
  • Analytics software.
  • Secure data storage and processing. 

Unique Benefits of Using SocialHub. 

Three benefits stand out for SocialHub users: 

  • Organizing and scheduling of content. 
  • Gain insights into performance with the analytics software  
  • Secure data storage and processing, with a high level of privacy protection. 

SocialHub Pricing

SocialHub comes in two plans, starting at 199 Euros per user/month

Consider the Following Pros of SocialHub. 

  • Analytics  
  • Data security  

Beware of the Following Cons of SocialHub. 

  • High pricing 
  • Difficult UI for new users 

‍
